inputs.normalization_note: Reported NAV zeros Russia. Liquid NAV ≈ reported. Edge is shadow NAV from the zero-marked Russia sleeve, not the thin discount to reported NAV.

optionality_gate.primary_label: discount to economic NAV illustration (Russia MTM)
optionality_gate.notes: Base stance gate keeps Russia at zero (4%/yr liquid path). The investment edge is the Russia option: local-only MTM illustration implies ~23% discount to economic NAV. Do not treat -4% vs reported NAV as the thesis.

zero_marked_sleeves.label: Russian securities marked at zero since 2022-03-14
zero_marked_sleeves.evidence: CEE-PH3.pdf Schedule of Investments; russia_mtm_illustration.json (MOEX proxies). Base stays zero until human sets P.

fund_nav_overlay.private_note: Moscow marks are not realizable USD for a US CEF. ADR/GDR unit mapping can overstate full-proxy totals.

bear.notes: Liquid CE book weak; Russia stays zero; discount widens slightly

base.notes: Russia stays $0 in base. Liquid book ~4%/yr with sticky reported-NAV discount. Shadow option not in the 4%.

bull.notes: Sensitivity only: liquid path plus roughly half of local-only Russia MTM (~$2.64/sh) realized over five years. Requires human P. Not base.

estimates.shadow_nav_note: Primary edge is discount to economic NAV illustration (-23% local / -32% full proxy), not -4% vs reported NAV.

human_review: Set realization_probability_base for Russia sleeve (still 0 in base).
Refresh Russia share counts from latest N-PORT/N-CSR.
Approve ADR/GDR mapping before using full-proxy ~$30 NAV.
Do not size on reported-NAV discount alone.
